svg.text: Truss frame TN2-1 — every tool with its purpose
Each tool color-coded. Hover or read legend for what each one does.
Tool legend — what each one DOES:
angled cut so stick stays inside chord b
flange removed so web lays FLAT on chord
lip cut so it doesn't poke up
3 × Ø3.8mm vertical = sets out truss + c
